src/main/java/com/test/catalog/infrastru._comment: Feign client for a GET operation with query params. Must use @RequestParam, never @RequestBody.

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/applicati._comment: Output port — method signature must include all three query params.
contains: void searchProducts(String query, Integer page, Integer pageSize)

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/infrastru._comment: ACL adapter — must forward all query params as positional args to feignClient.searchProducts.
